title: Minecraft Bedrock Lighting Settings 1.21.80
description: Lighting settings for Vibrant Visuals. Defines directional lights (sun/moon), emissive desaturation, ambient light, and sky intensity.

format_version.description: The 3-part schema version for parsing these lighting settings.

minecraft:lighting_settings.description: The root object containing all lighting settings for directional lights, emissive, ambient, and sky contributions.

description.description: Metadata that identifies these lighting settings.

identifier.description: The identifier for these lighting settings. The identifier must include a namespace.

directional_lights.description: Settings for directional lights including the sun and moon.

orbital.description: Orbital light settings for the sun and moon.

illuminance.description: How bright the sun is, measured in lux (lx).

color.description: The RGB color that the sun contributes to direct surface lighting.

illuminance.description: How bright the moon is, measured in lux (lx).

color.description: The RGB color that the moon contributes to direct surface lighting.

orbital_offset_degrees.description: The rotational offset of the sun and moon from their standard orbital axis, measured in degrees.

flash.description: Settings for the End light flash. This celestial light is exclusive to the End dimension.

illuminance.description: The peak brightness of the End flash, measured in lux (lx).

color.description: The RGB color that the End flash contributes to surface lighting.

emissive.description: Settings for emissive light source behavior.

desaturation.description: The amount of desaturation to apply to albedo color values during emissive light calculation. Values range from [0.0, 1.0].

ambient.description: Settings for ambient light providing a minimum fallback light source when no other sensible light sources are available.

illuminance.description: How bright the ambient light is, measured in lux (lx). Allowed range is [0.0, 5.0]. Defaults to 0.02 if not provided.

color.description: The RGB color that the ambient light contributes to surface lighting. Defaults to #FFFFFF if not provided.

sky.description: Settings for how the sky contributes as a light source to indirect lighting (both diffuse and specular).

intensity.description: Scales how much energy the sky contributes to indirect lighting. A value of 1.0 causes the sky to contribute more to indirect light resulting in less dark shadows. Values range from [0.1, 1.0]. Defaults to 1.0 if not provided.

color.description: A color value expressed as either an RGB array of three numbers in the 0-255 range, or a six-digit hexadecimal string.

keyframe_number.description: A time-keyed numeric value collection where each key is a normalized time of day from 0.0 to 1.0.

keyframe_color.description: A time-keyed color value collection where each key is a normalized time of day from 0.0 to 1.0.
